message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Acknowledging Heydon's review, 9/9 reached">
Thanks Heydon. Good to have explicit a11y confirmation that the ignored paths are inert from an accessibility standpoint, and that templates, static assets, and source code remain CI-triggering. The TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md step 11 update is already included in this change. We have 9/9 — committing and pushing now.
</teammate-message>
